html:
Wood Fences are wall-like Structures located in the Structures Tab. 3 Twigs and 1 Rope are required to craft 6 Wood Fences. They are flammable and can be destroyed with a Hammer or any weapon. Together with Wood Gates, they can be used both for decorative uses and for making a cage for a Mob. However, flying Mobs cannot be trapped using Wood Fences, as they will simply fly over it.

Fences seem to try to connect to adjacent fences, and rotate by a 45 degree angle every time. This allows for more practical placement.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Distinguished Ash Garden Fence, Walnut Garden Fence, and White Picket Fence skins were introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
  • The Woven - Distinguished Wrought Iron Fence, Antique Brass Fence, and Antique Bronze Fence skins were introduced during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021.
  • The Woven - Elegant Gingerbread Fence skin was introduced during the official Winter's Feast event in 2019.
Woven - Distinguished

Trivia

  • Wood Fences were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Willow's quote for the wood fence is likely a reference to the book The Adventures of Tom Sawyer.
  • It is the first stackable item to get a Skin.
    • Skinned fences and not skinned ones do not stack in the Inventory.

Wood Fences are wall-like Structures located in the Structures Tab. 3 Twigs and 1 Rope are required to craft 6 Wood Fences. They are flammable and can be destroyed with a Hammer or any weapon. Together with Wood Gates, they can be used both for decorative uses and for making a cage for a Mob. However, flying Mobs cannot be trapped using Wood Fences, as they will simply fly over it.
Fences seem to try to connect to adjacent fences, and rotate by a 45 degree angle every time. This allows for more practical placement.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Woven - Distinguished Ash Garden Fence, Walnut Garden Fence, and White Picket Fence skins were introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
The Woven - Distinguished Wrought Iron Fence, Antique Brass Fence, and Antique Bronze Fence skins were introduced during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021.
The Woven - Elegant Gingerbread Fence skin was introduced during the official Winter's Feast event in 2019.

Wood Fences were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Willow's quote for the wood fence is likely a reference to the book The Adventures of Tom Sawyer.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hàng rào Gỗ là những Công trình giống như bức tường nằm trong Tab Công trình. Cần 3 Cành Cây và 1 Dây Thừng để chế tạo 6 Hàng Rào Gỗ. Chúng dễ cháy và có thể bị phá hủy bằng Búa hoặc bất kỳ vũ khí nào. Cùng với Cổng Gỗ, chúng có thể được sử dụng cho cả mục đích trang trí và làm lồng cho Mob. Tuy nhiên, Mob bay không thể bị bẫy bằng Hàng rào Gỗ vì chúng sẽ bay qua hàng rào đó.

It's the great outdoors! |wanda = An incredibly ordinary wooden fence. |choose=wx78}} '''Wood Fences''' are wall-like [[Structures]] located in the [[Structures Tab]]. 3 [[Twigs]] and 1 [[Rope]] are required to craft 6 Wood Fences. They are flammable and can be destroyed with a [[Hammer]] or any weapon. Together with [[Wood Gate]]s, they can be used both for decorative uses and for making a cage for a [[Mob]]. However, flying Mobs cannot be trapped using Wood Fences, as they will simply fly over it. Fences seem to try to connect to adjacent fences, and rotate by a 45 degree angle every time. This allows for more practical placement. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Wood_Fence-0|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Distinguished Ash Garden Fence''', '''Walnut Garden Fence''', and '''White Picket Fence''' skins were introduced during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020. * The '''Woven - Distinguished Wrought Iron Fence''', '''Antique Brass Fence''', and '''Antique Bronze Fence''' skins were introduced during the official [[Year of the Beefalo]] event in 2021. * The '''Woven - Elegant Gingerbread Fence''' skin was introduced during the official [[Winter's Feast]] event in 2019.
